channel.title: 英劇 on 天漢帝國復興錄
channel.description: Recent content in 英劇 on 天漢帝國復興錄

item.title: 英劇《是大臣》對中國未來制度建設的啟示
item.description: Series 1 Open Government The Official Visit The Economy Drive Big Brother The Writing on the Wall The Right to Know Jobs for the Boys Series 2 The Compassionate Society Doing the Honours The Death List The Greasy Pole The Devil You Know The Quality of Life A Question of Loyalty Series 3 Equal Opportunities The Challenge The Skeleton in the Cupboard The Moral Dimension The Bed of Nails The

item.title: 英劇《是首相》對中國未來制度建設的啟示
item.description: 前言 Series 1 “The Grand Design” “The Ministerial Broadcast” “The Smoke Screen” “The Key” “A Real Partnership” “A Victory for Democracy” “The Bishop’s Gambit” “One of Us” Series 2 “Man Overboard” “Official Secrets” “A Diplomatic Incident” “A Conflict of Interest” “Power to the People” “The Patron of the Arts” “The National Education Service” “The Tangled Web”
